:::: {#exr-u1-exact-conv}
### Exact Conversions

Write **0.124** as a fraction. Give your answer in its simplest form.

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
### 🔍 View Solution

$0.124 = \frac{124}{1000}$  
Divide by 4: $\mathbf{\frac{31}{250}}$
:::

::: {.exercise-meta}
[Topic: Exact Conversions]{.badge .topic-badge}
[Skills: Simplifying Fractions]{.badge .skill-badge}

:::
::::
